portfolio.title: Remote Device Management
portfolio.description: Redesigned merchant payment analytics dashboard, increasing user engagement by 40%
portfolio.challenge: Merchants struggled to understand their payment data and identify growth opportunities
portfolio.solution: Created an intuitive dashboard with real-time analytics, customizable widgets, and actionable insights
portfolio.impact: 40% increase in daily active users, 25% reduction in support tickets

portfolio.title: Multi-Legal Entity Accounts
portfolio.description: Streamlined checkout flow for Square's mobile POS, reducing transaction time by 30%
portfolio.challenge: Complex checkout process was causing friction and abandoned transactions
portfolio.solution: Simplified the flow with smart defaults, one-tap actions, and contextual help
portfolio.impact: 30% faster transactions, 15% increase in completed sales

portfolio.title: Location Groups
portfolio.description: Built Square's unified design system from the ground up, scaling across 12+ product teams
portfolio.challenge: Inconsistent UI patterns and slow development cycles across multiple products
portfolio.solution: Created a comprehensive component library with design tokens, guidelines, and tooling
portfolio.impact: 50% faster development cycles, 90% design consistency across products

portfolio.title: GSK Design System
portfolio.description: Redesigned the merchant signup flow, improving conversion rates by 25%
portfolio.challenge: High drop-off rates during merchant registration and complex verification process
portfolio.solution: Progressive disclosure, smart form validation, and real-time guidance
portfolio.impact: 25% improvement in signup conversion, 40% reduction in time-to-first-sale

prompts: What do you do for fun?
How much code do you know?

What is your background?.content: I've spent time both working on consumer-facing apps and internal tools as well. Here's a summary of what I've focused on over the years.

2020 – 2024
Established the design systems function, team, and vision at Cash App. Major initiatives include the visual evolution of a new design language, infrastructure, and company wide migration to the new system ($arcade). Prior to this John did a short stint at Netflix working as a proxy between R&D and design systems.

Can I see some work?.content: Sure! Here are some of my recent projects. Click on any card to see the full case study.

What do you do for fun?.content: When I'm not designing or coding, I love exploring new places and trying different cuisines. I'm also really into photography - there's something satisfying about capturing the perfect moment or interesting composition. On quieter days, you'll find me reading design books, experimenting with new creative tools, or working on personal projects that let me blend my love for design and technology.

How much code do you know?.content: I'm comfortable with front-end development - HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and TypeScript are in my toolkit. I also work with design systems and component libraries regularly. While I'm not a full-stack engineer, I know enough to prototype ideas, communicate effectively with developers, and sometimes build simple applications like this chat interface. Coding helps me bridge the gap between design and implementation.
